task: Expanded context-orchestrator with MCP gateway tests, corpus freshness status, and Qdrant-inspired doc chunking
notes: Added protocol-level MCP gateway coverage using the SDK Client + InMemoryTransport.
Added index run tracking so status/reindex responses include freshness metadata, chunk counts, document counts, embedding model, and cache/artifact dashboard stats.
Adopted selective codex-orch-unified Qdrant ingest ideas: ignore noisy directories and chunk large repo docs before embedding.
outcome: The orchestrator now exposes richer status/reindex payloads and has broader reliability coverage over both services and MCP tool outputs.
